tuning_key.text: We arrive as a spark of light with a story yet to write
tuning_key.attribution: Chords of Truth — Lucid Principles Canon (CC BY 4.0)

context_block: The light you carry arrived before your story did — and that's not a problem to solve, it's the opening itself. Right now, in this exact not-knowing, you have permission to move without the weight of already-written endings, to let what wants to emerge do so without your approval first. Joy isn't waiting for you to get it right; it's already sparking in the blank pages, in the chambers of possibility that open the moment you stop insisting the story should already make sense.

practice.title: Arrival Breath
practice.instruction: Inhale for four counts while noticing one thing around you that you haven't named yet — a texture, a light, a sound — and exhale while releasing any story about what it means.

practice.title: Blank Page Pause
practice.instruction: Stop moving for thirty seconds and place your hand on your chest; feel the aliveness there without asking it to become anything, without writing over it with purpose or plan.

practice.title: The Sparking Listen
practice.instruction: Return to your breath and play the echo audio at normal speed, letting the frequency move through you as permission rather than instruction — the light finds its own corners.
